title: carex indica var. fissilis
intro: Carex indica var. fissilis, also known as the Indian sedge, is a type of perennial herb belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of various compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Carex indica var. fissilis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
